title: Password Generator
shortDescription: Create strong random passwords with chosen length and character rules.
metaDescription: Create strong random passwords with custom length and character rules in seconds.
intro: Create a strong random password by choosing the length and character options you want.
overview:
This tool generates random passwords that are harder to guess than words or reused phrases. Set the length, choose whether to include uppercase letters, lowercase letters, numbers, and symbols, then copy the result you need.

Use longer passwords for accounts that matter most, and avoid patterns like names, dates, or repeated symbols. If your service has a password policy, match those requirements here before saving the password in your manager.
howItWorks: Select the character types you want included.
Generate the password and copy it safely.

useCases.description: Generate a fresh password when creating a new email, cloud, or shopping account.

useCases.title: Policy-matched password
useCases.description: Make a password that fits site rules such as minimum length, symbols, or digit requirements.

useCases.description: Replace an older admin or dashboard password with a stronger random one.

examples.description: A compact password suited to accounts that accept mixed letters and digits.

examples.title: 24-character vault password

faq.question: Can I control which characters are included?
faq.answer: Yes. You can usually choose letter case, numbers, and symbols so the password matches the account rules.

faq.question: Why do some passwords look hard to remember?
faq.answer: That is intentional. Random combinations are safer than predictable words, names, or repeated patterns.

faq.question: What if a website rejects the password?
faq.answer: Check the site’s limits for length or allowed symbols, then generate a new one that fits those rules.

faq.question: Should I reuse the same password here?
faq.answer: No. Generate a separate password for each important account so one breach does not expose others.
